name: Affiliates
description: For affiliate and creator partnership teams managing influencer relationships, campaign cycles, attribution, and performance-based collaboration.

stakeholderRoles.label: Creator Lead
stakeholderRoles.description: Primary creator or influencer driving the audience relationship

stakeholderRoles.label: Manager / Agent
stakeholderRoles.description: Represents the creator commercially and handles negotiation

stakeholderRoles.label: Content Producer
stakeholderRoles.description: Helps create, edit, or schedule campaign content

stakeholderRoles.label: Brand Contact
stakeholderRoles.description: Internal or external stakeholder approving brand fit and creative direction

stakeholderRoles.label: Analytics Contact
stakeholderRoles.description: Owns attribution, reporting, and conversion analysis

stakeholderRoles.label: Finance Contact
stakeholderRoles.description: Handles invoices, payouts, and commission questions

internalTeamRoles.label: Affiliate Manager
internalTeamRoles.description: Owns creator relationship and performance plan

internalTeamRoles.label: Creator Ops
internalTeamRoles.description: Handles onboarding, tracking links, codes, and payouts

internalTeamRoles.label: Performance Marketing
internalTeamRoles.description: Owns CAC, conversion, and channel performance

internalTeamRoles.label: Legal
internalTeamRoles.description: Reviews contracts, disclosures, and usage rights

dimensionGuidance.meeting_cadence: Evaluate whether creator check-ins, launch reviews, and campaign retros are happening at the right cadence.
dimensionGuidance.email_engagement: Read creator and manager responsiveness around briefs, content, tracking, and payout issues.
dimensionGuidance.stakeholder_coverage: Assess coverage across creator, manager, producer, brand, analytics, and finance contacts.
dimensionGuidance.key_advocate_health: Assess whether the creator lead is engaged, aligned with the brand, and actively promoting the campaign.
dimensionGuidance.financial_proximity: Focus on campaign end dates, commission terms, payout friction, attributed revenue, and renewal potential.
dimensionGuidance.signal_momentum: Weigh content progress, conversion trend, tracking quality, launch readiness, and creator enthusiasm.

briefingEmphasis: Focus on creator responsiveness, content approval status, attribution quality, and upcoming campaign moments. Prioritize creators with blocked launches or performance shifts.
